resultList.dtldesc: 2 BHK Builder Floor for Sale in Rohini Sector 15, New DelhiIntroductionLocated in the well-established residential locality of Rohini Sector 15, this 2 BHK builder floor offers a practical and well-connected living option in North West Delhi. Situated near Vikas Bharti School, the property enjoys excellent access to schools, hospitals, metro connectivity and daily conveniences. With a peaceful residential environment and strong infrastructure, this home is suitable for both end-use and investment in a prime Delhi location.Property SpecificationsThis ready-to-move builder floor is located on the ground floor of a three-storey building and offers a carpet area of 60 sq. m approximately 646 sq. ft. The flat comprises two bedrooms, one bathroom and one balcony, making it suitable for small families or individual occupants.The property is unfurnished, giving buyers the flexibility to design and customise interiors as per their preferences. The layout includes a combined living and dining area along with functional room planning for efficient use of space. The apartment is north-east facing, which is considered favourable as per vastu principles.The unit comes with one open car parking space and benefits from reserved parking provisions. Being a ground-floor unit, it offers easy accessibility and added convenience for senior residents or families preferring low-floor living. The property is around 10 to 15 years old and is well maintained.FacilitiesThe builder floor offers essential residential facilities including 24-hour water supply and individual utility meters for water and electricity, ensuring independent usage without interference. The property also benefits from reserved parking and CCTV surveillance for basic security.The building has a simple and functional setup suitable for comfortable urban living. The ground-floor placement ensures easy access and reduced dependency on vertical movement.LocalityRohini Sector 15 is a well-developed residential area in New Delhi known for its planned layout and strong connectivity. The property is located close to Vikas Bharti School and offers walking distance access to educational institutions, hospitals and local markets.The area is well connected by metro, with the station located approximately 1 km away, ensuring easy commuting to other parts of Delhi. With its strategic location, functional layout and strong connectivity, this 2 BHK builder floor presents a good residential opportunity in North West Delhi.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience a refined urban lifestyle with this splendid multistorey apartment available for sale in the heart of Ghaziabad. Set within the premium and well-established Rajnagar Residency project, this ready-to-move-in property delivers the perfect blend of modern comfort, structural elegance, and an enriching atmosphere. Benefiting from an east-facing orientation, the home is naturally bright, well-ventilated, and ideally configured to suit the lifestyle of contemporary families.                                Property SpecificationsThis spacious residence spans a generous super area of 1,674 sq. ft and occupies a prominent position on the 14th floor of a 14-storey building, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscape. Two wide balconies offer a pleasant space to unwind while overlooking the garden, park, and main road. Fully furnished and boasting freehold ownership, this property stands between 5 to 10 years old, representing excellent construction quality.FacilitiesResidents of this township can enjoy a comprehensive collection of modern amenities and infrastructure facilities designed to enhance daily living. A standout advantage of this address is its immediate proximity to the KW Delhi 6 Mall, which stands adjacent to the complex, bringing elite shopping, dining, and entertainment venues right to the doorstep. The neighbourhood features excellent social infrastructure with reputed educational options like Sanfort International School situated nearby. Public transit options are readily accessible, and the well-developed civic network ensures that healthcare facilities, essential shopping markets, banks, and commercial zones are easily reachable.

The East-facing orientation ensures that the home is filled with natural light and remains well-ventilated throughout the day. The residence features a sophisticated layout with four spacious bedrooms, four modern bathrooms, and four private balconies that offer breathtaking views of the lush gardens, swimming pool, and the main road. In addition to the primary living spaces, the apartment includes a puja room, a study, a store, and a servant room, catering to every functional requirement of a large household. Practical needs are fully addressed with high-speed lifts, a 100% power backup system, and consistent water supply. Security is paramount, with 24/7 surveillance, professional security personnel, and a gated community setup ensuring peace of mind for all residents. Dedicated covered parking is provided, and the premises are meticulously maintained by the developer’s staff.::::Locality::::Sector 106 is a prime residential hub situated along the high-profile Dwarka Expressway, offering exceptional connectivity to both Delhi and the heart of Gurgaon. The property is conveniently located near major commercial landmarks and transport routes. Educational institutions like St. Michael's Sr. Sec. School are within easy reach, and healthcare needs are served by nearby medical centres. For shopping and daily necessities, the Conscient One mall and various local markets like Kisan Mandi Mart are just a short distance away. The locality is well-served by public transport, and its proximity to the airport and the upcoming commercial hubs makes it one of the most desirable addresses in Gurgaon for professionals and families alike.
